section_title: 5.1 Africa under Roman Dominion (c. 30 BC–100 AD)
visual_assets: MAP: Roman North Africa — show Africa Proconsularis, Numidia, Mauretania Caesariensis/Tingitana, Cyrenaica; mark Carthage, Hippo, Cirta, Tingis; indicate grain-producing regions and major ports.
TIMELINE: Roman Africa — rows: Conventional Dates vs Biblical tags (if any); include key events 30 BC → 700 AD.
notes: The audit flagged several long sentences and two instances of passive voice. While the score is high, I will aim for shorter sentences and more active voice in the following sections.
